careers.name: Architect
careers.overview: Architect works in architecture, planning and built-environment projects.
careers.whyChoose: Architect offers strong career growth, creative problem solving and infrastructure impact.
careers.educationPath: Class 12 → B.Arch/B.Plan/Relevant Degree → Internship → Professional Practice.
careers.workEnvironment: Architecture firms, planning consultancies, government agencies and private sector organizations.
careers.futureScope: Strong due to urbanization, infrastructure development and smart city initiatives.
careers.aiImpact: AI assists visualization, planning and modeling but professional judgment remains essential.
